purpose: Stylesheet for the Git Manager view (.git-manager-* classes, 2401 lines). Mirrors the IDE layout pattern: repo tabs across top, sidebar + divider + content area beneath. Sections: container/repo-tab-bar (with active/icon/branch-badge styling), main layout (flex sidebar+content), sidebar (changes list at ~300px default with resize divider), changes panel (staged/unstaged file lists with stage/unstage controls), commit panel (message input + commit button), divider (resizable separator), content area (right panel showing diff/history/branches), diff viewer (green/red line-level highlighting), branch panel (branch list + merge/rebase controls), history panel (commit log table), quick actions bar (bottom action strip with centered modal popup variant), confirmation/safety dialog, loading spinner & loading-state full-panel overlay, empty states, error state, generic tooltip, generic count/status badge, stash list, merge/rebase conflict indicator, keyboard shortcut hints, and scrollbar overrides for git-manager panels.
gotchas: All classes are .git-manager-* prefixed — DO NOT introduce unprefixed selectors. Doing so will conflict with global index.css and ide-*.css selectors.
Hidden scrollbars via scrollbar-width:none + ::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none} in repo-tabs-scroll mean horizontal overflow is silent — users discover scrollability only via touch/wheel.
Layout structurally mirrors ide-layout.css — divergence between the two will cause visual inconsistency in user-facing ergonomics. Keep height/min-height/padding values aligned when changing.
Diff viewer uses literal green/red colors for added/removed lines (not theme variables) — palette drift in custom themes.

Quick Actions Bar exists in TWO variants in this file: bottom-strip (line 1358) and centered modal (line 2156). Don't conflate the two when editing — each has its own .git-manager-quick-actions-* selectors.
patterns: Strict prefix scoping (.git-manager-*) to enable safe coexistence with other feature stylesheets.
Layout via flex containers with fixed heights and flex-shrink:0 lock-zones.
Glass surfaces using --surface and --border tokens consumed from index.css.
